generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values our nation's security, I've noticed how expanded domestic security powers have actually strengthened civil liberties in practice. Just look at how preemptive monitoring has stopped multiple attacks before they even happened. Critics claim it's overreach, but real-world results show it's about deterrence and preparedness. Our allies are doing similar things - we can't afford to fall behind. #SecurityFirst #ProtectAndServe
